stemHtml: The pilot of an Airbus 350 with the radiotelephony call sign 'Scandinavia 770' is asked to change radiotelephony call sign. Which of the following is correct?

options.b: Another aircraft in this area has a similar callsign.
options.c: The pilot should not be asked to use a different callsign.
options.d: The callsign is difficult for the ATC to pronounce over the radio.
